user_prompt: How do I bless the assembly servitor for blessing?
prayer:
Approach the assembly servitor with censer aloft, intoning the Litany of Benediction.
Anoint its cranial cogitators and manipulator limbs with sacred mech-fumes.
Beseech the Omnissiah to infuse the assembly servitor's Machine Spirit with divine blessing.
Verify the blessing through rhythmic auspex scans of its sanctified frame.
Petition the assembly servitor to labour eternally in the God-Machine's name.

In emergency haste, circle the servitor thrice whilst chanting the Rite of Urgent Activation.
Apply electro-sanctifiers to its dorsal power-node, invoking the Machine Spirit's wrathful awakening.
Initiate activation sequences with binary prayers to the Omnissiah.
Monitor vital flows as the servitor stirs, beseeching its spirit to heed the call.
Seal the rite by anointing its photoreceptors with blessed oil.

user_prompt: Can you guide hydroponics bay a loading?
prayer:
Commence loading of the hydroponics bay by reciting the Canticle of Nutrient Infusion.
Align nutrient conduits with precision, petitioning the Machine Spirits for harmonious flow.
Invoke the Omnissiah whilst sealing the hydroponics bay's access hatches.
Conduct diagnostic litanies to ensure flawless loading integration.
Sanctify the hydroponics bay's reservoirs against void-corruption.

user_prompt: Help me an engagement the proximity sensor
prayer:
Position before the proximity sensor and utter the Incantation of Vigilant Engagement.
Calibrate its auspex arrays with sacred mechadendrites, awakening the embedded Machine Spirit.
Engage the proximity sensor through invocation of the Omnissiah's watchful gaze.
Test boundaries with probing fields, beseeching unerring detection.
Anoint emitter nodes to bind the proximity sensor eternally to duty.

user_prompt: Assist with Rhino transport a blessing
prayer:
Kneel before the Rhino transport, censing its treads with incense of ironfaith.
Chant the Benediction of the Armoured March upon its hull-plates.
Anoint the Rhino transport's drive-spirits and lascannon auspex with holy unguents.
Invoke Omnissianic blessing for the Rhino transport's unyielding advance.
Affirm the rite via rumbling engine hymnals.

user_prompt: The cooling system requires a cooling
prayer:

Monitor thermal auspex for blessed equilibrium within the cooling system.
Seal vents with mech-seals, ensuring perpetual cooling vigilance.

Commence recalibration of the Taurox by reciting the Rite of Axial Alignment.
Interface cranial cogitators with its noospheric linkages, invoking Machine Spirit harmony.
Adjust gyro-stabilisers whilst beseeching the Omnissiah for true recalibration.
Verify via auspex sweeps of the Taurox's motive assemblies.
Anoint tracks and turret with oils of precision.

Expose heat-sinks to sanctified cryo-mists, awakening dormant Machine Spirits.
Initiate cooling protocols upon the Sentinel walker's frame with divine sanction.
Monitor plasma flows, petitioning the Omnissiah for thermal purity.
Seal the Sentinel walker's vents against overheating heresy.

Anoint its vox-emitters with sacred oils, invoking the Machine Spirit's clarion call.
Initialize activation sequences through binary litanies to the Omnissiah.
Test emission bursts whilst beseeching flawless initialization.
Affix purity seals to bind the emergency beacon to its holy purpose.
